examples: The content of total vitamin C and reductive ascorbic acid were determined by 2,4-dinitrobenzene hydrazine.
In HCl medium, trace o-dinitrobenzene can sensitively inhibit the discoloration reaction of neutral red oxidized by KIO4.
The dinitrobenzene with electron-withdrawing group can be hydrogenated much easier than the dinitrobenzene with electron-donating group.
